chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1562 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7780/2024. 2. For hearing of CMA No.7781/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Abdur Razzaq, advocate for the respondent 1. Mr. Aamir Ali, advocate for the respondent / SBCA. Mr. Manzoor Hussain, advocate for the respondent / SBCA. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Counsel for the petitioners’ states that the grievance will be agitated in the first instance before the concerned forum and thereafter the petitioners may seek further recourse, if aggrieved. In view hereof, petition is disposed of. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
